name: OSINT Framework
description: Web-based directory tree of OSINT tools and resources organized by data type (username, email, phone, image, geolocation, etc.).
bestFor: Starting point / lookup directory to find the right tool for a given selector
trustNote: Long-standing, widely cited community OSINT directory (11k+ stars).
notes: Hosted at osintframework.com. Not a tool itself but the canonical map to pivot from a selector to relevant tools. Some linked tools are dead; cross-check.

name: Shadowbroker
description: Platform tracking global intelligence signals including corporate jets, satellites, and seismic events with AI analysis.
bestFor: Tracking aircraft/satellite/geophysical signals; situational GEOINT
trustNote: Popular (9k+ stars) but broad-scope intelligence aggregator.
notes: More oriented to geopolitical/aviation tracking than person-finding.

name: GoSearch
description: Go CLI that searches a username across 300+ websites to map a person's digital footprint, including breach data.
bestFor: Fast username enumeration across many platforms from the command line
notes: Integrates breach lookups (HudsonRock) and can surface emails. Verify hits manually; account checkers produce false positives.

name: Awesome Telegram OSINT
description: Curated list of Telegram OSINT tools, bots, sites and resources.
bestFor: Finding tools/bots to investigate Telegram users, groups, and channels
notes: Catalog to mine for individual Telegram tools/bots; many bots can resolve phone-to-account.

name: Tookie-OSINT
description: Tool for finding social media accounts based on user inputs (username and related identifiers).
bestFor: Discovering social media accounts tied to a username
notes: Account checker output should be manually verified.

name: Social-Media-OSINT-Tools-Collection
description: Large curated collection of social media OSINT tools (SOCINT) organized by platform.
bestFor: Finding platform-specific tools for Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Telegram, etc.
trustNote: Rich, frequently referenced SOCINT catalog (1.8k+ stars).
notes: Excellent mining target: lists 290+ discrete tools across 16 platforms. Many entries are free web tools.

name: PentestingEverything
description: Comprehensive penetration testing methodology guide (web, mobile, API, network).
bestFor: Pentest methodology reference
notes: Offensive security focus; not person-finding.

name: Trickest Inventory
description: Asset inventory of 800+ public bug bounty programs.
bestFor: Bug bounty scope and asset enumeration
notes: Infrastructure recon, not person-finding.

name: Non-typical OSINT Guide
description: Unconventional OSINT guide for experienced investigators covering advanced techniques.
bestFor: Advanced/creative OSINT methodology and lesser-known resources
notes: Contains pointers to many niche tools and crypto/dark-web techniques.

name: ClatScope Info Tool
description: Versatile recon utility providing geolocation, DNS, WHOIS, and 70+ reconnaissance features.
bestFor: All-in-one lookups across email, name, IP, domain, geolocation
notes: Aggregates many lookup features; useful for quick pivots on multiple selectors.

name: HowToFind osint-tools catalog
description: Open-source catalog of 300+ OSINT tools indexed by data input type (account, email, phone, face, location, etc.).
bestFor: Looking up tools by the selector you already have (e.g. face, plate number, MAC)
notes: Organized by input type incl. Face, PlateNumber, Phone, Location, Voice - ideal for pivoting from a single found selector.

name: OhSINT GitBook
description: OSINT blog and resource collection with tools and investigative references.
bestFor: Methodology reading and curated tool references
notes: Good companion reading; contains tool links across categories.

name: Mailcat
description: Finds existing email addresses for a username via API and SMTP verification across providers.
bestFor: Discovering which email providers a username has accounts on
notes: SMTP verification touches mail servers (active); may be rate-limited or blocked. Good for pivoting username -> email.

name: OSINT-FORENSICS-MOBILE
description: Collection of mobile OSINT and forensics tools.
bestFor: Mobile device and phone-number focused OSINT/forensics tooling
notes: Mining target for phone/mobile-specific tools.

name: aiodnsbrute
description: Python asynchronous DNS brute-force utility.
bestFor: Subdomain brute forcing
notes: Infrastructure recon; not person-finding.

name: osint-namecheckers-list
description: Curated list of tools that search accounts by username (name checkers).
bestFor: Choosing among username-enumeration tools
trustNote: Maintained by soxoj (Maigret author), a respected OSINT developer (666 stars).
notes: Authoritative shortlist of username-search tools to pivot on a found nickname.

name: Ominis-OSINT
description: Python tool performing online information gathering via search engine queries.
bestFor: Automated search-engine reconnaissance on a name/term
notes: Scrapes search engines; may hit captchas/rate limits.

name: DFW1N-OSINT (Australia)
description: Australian-focused open-source intelligence resource repository.
bestFor: Australia-specific public records and OSINT sources
notes: Useful for AU-based cases; links to local registries and people-search.

name: Awesome Browser Extensions for OSINT
description: Collection of browser extensions useful for OSINT with use-case documentation.
bestFor: Finding browser extensions to speed up investigations
notes: Includes image search, profile scraping, and data-collection extensions.

name: tgspyder
description: Telegram analysis tool for social media intelligence and threat research.
bestFor: Scraping/analyzing Telegram channels and users
notes: Requires a Telegram account/API credentials.

name: querytool (Oryon)
description: Framework for sophisticated Google searches of terms, people, emails, and files via Google Spreadsheet integration.
bestFor: Structured Google dorking for people, emails, and documents
notes: Generates dork queries; pairs well with name/email pivots.

name: findme (0xSaikat)
description: CLI tool locating social media and online profiles linked to a username.
bestFor: Username-to-profile discovery and digital footprint verification
notes: Verify hits manually.

name: awesome-osint-mcp-servers
description: Curated list of OSINT MCP servers for AI-driven investigations.
bestFor: Finding MCP servers to wire OSINT tools into an AI agent
trustNote: By soxoj; directly relevant to agent-driven OSINT (255 stars).
notes: High-value for this skill library: lists MCP servers that an agent like ours can call directly.

name: Coeus-OSINT-ToolBox
description: Toolbox offering social media monitoring, data analysis, and intelligence gathering.
bestFor: Multi-function social media monitoring and analysis
notes: All-in-one social monitoring suite.

name: osint-bookmark
description: Curated collection of investigation tools for company research, scanning, DNS, and Whois.
bestFor: Bookmark-style reference of investigation tools
notes: More corporate/infra oriented.

name: gitxray
description: Security tool using GitHub REST APIs for reconnaissance, forensics, and pentesting of repos/users.
bestFor: Profiling a GitHub user/contributor (emails, activity, identities)
notes: Can surface a developer's email and linked identities from GitHub metadata.

name: username-generation-guide
description: Definitive guide to generating username permutations for OSINT.
bestFor: Expanding a known nickname into candidate usernames to search
notes: Methodology to widen username search space before running enumerators.

name: SpiderFoot (poppopjmp fork)
description: Automated OSINT collection engine for threat analysis and attack-surface mapping across 200+ modules.
bestFor: Automated multi-source enrichment of a name/email/domain/IP/phone
trustNote: Fork of the well-known SpiderFoot framework (174 stars on fork).
notes: Powerful all-in-one enrichment; some modules are active (DNS/port scans). Configure passive-only mode for OPSEC-sensitive cases.

name: OSINT-Kit (buddhsen-tripathi)
description: Curated toolkit collection for investigation activities including auditing and aggregation.
bestFor: General toolkit reference
notes: General-purpose tool references.

name: Snap-Scraper
description: Downloads media from Snapchat's Snap Map using coordinates.
bestFor: Pulling geolocated public Snapchat media for a location
notes: Great for last-known-location work: harvests public Snaps near coordinates that may show a person or scene.

name: OSINT-Communities-Practitioners
description: List of OSINT practitioners, blogs, and tutorials.
bestFor: Finding expert communities and learning resources
notes: Reference for practitioner blogs (incl. missing-persons/Trace Labs adjacent).

name: IntelHub (Chrome extension)
description: Chrome extension bundling OSINT tools and Google Dorking assistants.
bestFor: Quick in-browser access to dorks and OSINT lookups
notes: Speeds up dork generation from the browser.

name: instatracker (ibnaleem)
description: Python script that tracks an Instagram account and logs changes over time.
bestFor: Monitoring an Instagram target for changes
notes: Requires an IG session; monitoring is repeated polling (more active).

name: OSINTtools (LinaYorda)
description: Social media OSINT tools curated for Trace Labs Search Party CTF (missing persons).
bestFor: Missing-persons CTF (Trace Labs) tooling and workflow
trustNote: Directly tied to Trace Labs missing-persons CTF (77 stars).
notes: Highly aligned with our use case: assembled specifically for missing-persons investigations.

name: One-Liner-OSINT
description: Collection of one-liner shell commands for OSINT gathering.
bestFor: Quick command-line recon snippets
notes: Mostly infra/domain recon snippets.

name: FRAVIA (soxoj)
description: "The Art of Searching" - advanced search engine techniques and resources.
bestFor: Advanced search-engine querying methodology
notes: Improves search-engine craft for finding hard-to-locate references.

name: Owl-sint
description: Tool for searching phone number information and tracking.
bestFor: Phone number lookups
notes: Phone-to-person pivots are valuable in missing-persons work; cross-check results.

name: vichiti
description: OSINT tool built with Node.js for gathering information across sources.
bestFor: General OSINT enrichment from a single input
notes: General-purpose enrichment.

name: DIGI-NETRA
description: Python OSINT toolkit for tracing phone numbers, usernames, IPs, and emails.
bestFor: Multi-selector tracing (phone, username, IP, email)
notes: Covers several useful person-finding selectors in one tool; verify outputs.

name: OSINT-HUB-FR
description: OSINT database covering France and international resources.
bestFor: France-specific public records and OSINT sources
notes: Useful for EU/France cases.

name: OSINT-Tools-Bulgaria
description: Bulgarian OSINT tools list (regional registries and sources).
bestFor: Bulgaria-specific public records and OSINT sources
notes: Regional coverage for EU cases.

name: osintxphone
description: OSINT tool to verify and look up phone numbers in Mexico.
bestFor: Mexico phone-number verification/lookup
notes: Useful for Mexico-based phone pivots.

name: NumSpy (India)
description: Find details of any mobile number in India.
bestFor: India mobile-number lookups
trustNote: Older regional phone tool (22 stars); may be unmaintained.
notes: India-specific; verify it still works.

name: OSINT-Toolkit (Cybersight-Security)
description: Comprehensive catalog of tools and websites for OSINT investigations.
bestFor: Broad tool/website reference
notes: General reference catalog.

name: socialfinder (rix4uni)
description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks.
bestFor: Username-to-social-account enumeration
notes: Verify hits manually.

name: Osint-Sync (karamabbasi05)
description: Browser extension to discover usernames, emails, and phone numbers across 20+ platforms.
bestFor: In-browser multi-selector discovery
notes: Extension form factor for quick lookups.

name: Reccon (sammwyy)
description: Web-based OSINT application to detect and gather usernames.
bestFor: Web UI username discovery
notes: Username focus.

name: WebHound (AnonCatalyst)
description: Python command-line assistant for web searches.
bestFor: Command-line search assistant
notes: Wraps web searches.

name: datasploit (FOGSEC mirror)
description: OSINT framework to perform reconnaissance on companies, people, emails, domains, and phone numbers.
bestFor: Automated enrichment across people/email/domain/phone selectors
trustNote: Mirror of the classic (now largely unmaintained) DataSploit framework (13 stars on mirror).
notes: Legacy framework; many modules need API keys and some are stale. Use as reference.

name: GOSINT (ruyynn)
description: Python educational framework for learning open-source intelligence techniques.
bestFor: Learning OSINT techniques
notes: Training-oriented.

name: Maltego (M0m0SMS-OSINT compilation)
description: Maltego compilation including assets, local transforms, and helper scripts.
bestFor: Extending Maltego link-analysis with community transforms
trustNote: Community transform compilation (155 stars). Maltego itself is freemium (free Community Edition).
notes: Maltego CE is free with limits; this repo adds local transforms for relationship mapping (associates of a missing person).

name: OSINT-Explorer
description: New-generation OSINT framework.
bestFor: General OSINT framework reference
notes: General-purpose.

name: Maigret (via socid_extractor / soxoj ecosystem)
description: Extracts account details and identifiers (names, IDs, linked profiles) from social media and other pages.
bestFor: Pulling hidden identifiers (real name, user ID, linked accounts) from a profile URL
trustNote: By soxoj; widely used companion to Maigret (listed in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Extracts metadata/IDs from a known profile to pivot to other accounts. Surfaced inside the Social-Media-OSINT collection.

name: Instaloader
description: Downloads Instagram pictures, videos, captions, and metadata for public (and own) accounts.
bestFor: Archiving an Instagram profile's media and metadata
trustNote: Long-established, widely trusted IG tool (listed in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Downloading touches IG servers (rate-limited; login increases ban risk). Captions/timestamps can place a person; geotags occasionally present.

name: Osintgram
description: Interactive Instagram OSINT tool to collect followers, comments, tagged users, emails, phone numbers, and locations.
bestFor: Deep reconnaissance of an Instagram target's network and contacts
trustNote: Popular IG OSINT tool (listed in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Requires an IG login (ban risk). Can surface associates, emails, phones, and post locations - valuable for missing-persons network mapping.

name: whopostedwhat.com
description: Facebook keyword search engine that finds posts by keyword on specific dates.
bestFor: Finding Facebook posts mentioning a name/keyword on a date range
trustNote: Widely used Facebook search tool (in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Free; registration for some features. Good for locating Facebook activity around a disappearance date.

name: IntelTechniques Tools (search engines suite)
description: Michael Bazzell's suite of free web OSINT search tools across many selectors (name, email, username, phone, image, location, etc.).
bestFor: One-stop free search interfaces for nearly every selector
trustNote: By Michael Bazzell (IntelTechniques), an authoritative OSINT source (referenced via the LinkedIn search tool in the collection).
notes: Free hosted tools; some have been disabled over time due to platform changes. Excellent canonical starting suite for person-finding.

name: Snapchat Map Scraper (nemec)
description: Scrapes public Snap Map stories.
bestFor: Harvesting public Snapchat stories at a location
notes: Location-based public media; useful for last-known-location scene review.

name: SnapIntel
description: Python tool to gather information about a Snapchat user.
bestFor: Profiling a Snapchat username
notes: Snapchat user enrichment.

name: Universal Reddit Scraper (URS)
description: Python tool to scrape Reddit submissions, comments, and user activity.
bestFor: Pulling a Reddit user's full post/comment history
notes: Reddit API credentials needed. History often reveals location, routines, and associates.

name: ReverseContact
description: Finds a LinkedIn profile and enriched identity data from an email address.
bestFor: Email-to-LinkedIn/identity pivot
trustNote: Commercial enrichment service with limited free lookups (in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Free tier limited; resolves an email to a real name and LinkedIn profile.

name: memory.lol
description: Historical Twitter/X username and screen-name change history lookup.
bestFor: Resolving old Twitter handles and tracking handle changes for an account
trustNote: Well-known handle-history tool (in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Maps a current X account to its prior usernames - useful when a person renamed/abandoned an account.

name: Picuki
description: View and browse public Instagram profiles, posts, and stories without logging in.
bestFor: Anonymous viewing of a public Instagram profile
trustNote: Popular IG viewer (in the Social-Media-OSINT collection).
notes: Lets you review a target's IG posts without a logged-in account (lower OPSEC footprint than logging in).

name: Toutatis
description: Collects information (obfuscated email/phone, IDs) from Instagram accounts via the API.
bestFor: Recovering obfuscated email/phone hints tied to an Instagram account
trustNote: By megadose (Holehe author); listed in the Social-Media-OSINT collection.
notes: Needs an IG session ID. Returns partially masked recovery email/phone that can confirm an account belongs to a known person.
